product_results.title: Veehoo Orthopedic Memory Foam Dog Bed, 7 Inch Thick Extra Large XXL Dog Bed for Senior Dogs with Ultra-Soft Fluffy Surface, Waterproof Liner, Removable Washable Cover and Non-Slip Bottom, 52"x36"x7"

details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Water Resistant

about_item: 7" Orthopedic Relief for Aching Joints: Give your senior companion or large breed the pain-free rest they deserve. Our therapeutic 7" orthopedic dog bed combines premium memory foam and support foam to precisely cradle joints, alleviate pressure points, and provide comfort especially for dogs suffering from arthritis or other joint issues.

Sprawled-Out Freedom for Large Breeds & Seniors: Our generously sized large dog bed 52"L x 36"W x 7"Th offers ample space with 200lb-max support, empowering large breeds or less-mobile seniors to stretch fully, turn easily, and find their perfect, orthopedic-supported position. No more cramped, uncomfortable nights!

Luxurious Plush Fur for Deep Healing Sleep: Imagine your cherished dog sinking into cloud-like comfort. The ultra-soft faux fur surface of this memory foam dog bed offers skin-friendly warmth and breathability, promoting deep restorative sleep for your pet all night long.

Waterproof & Anti-Slip Protection: The orthopedic dog bed features a waterproof inner liner that shields the foam from accidents and keeps it dry and comfortable, while the non-slip bottom ensures stability for this large orthopedic dog bed during active use.
Hassle-Free Clean with Removable Washable Cover: The washable dog bed with an easily removable zippered cover makes cleaning a breeze, ensuring your pup always has a fresh and hygienic place to rest.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed well-made and suitable for large dogs, with one noting it's big enough for multiple pets. The bed is firm but not too hard, and customers appreciate its comfort, particularly for arthritic senior dogs, with one mentioning it helps relieve pressure on hips and elbows. Customers praise its durability and support, noting it holds up well and doesn't sag under weight. The thickness receives mixed feedback, with some customers finding it thick while others say it's not 7 inches as advertised.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Bed for Senior Dogs
authors_reviews.text: My 13 year old dog has gotten painful joints that make laying on her old dog bed uncomfortable. From the minute I put this bed down, she sprawled out on it and took a long nap. She frequently naps or lays on this bed, and seems much more comfortable on it. I appreciate the removable cover that can be washed. Memory foam is thick, high quality, firm but supportive, and the xl size is big enough for my 60 pound dog- there’s so much extra room. Easy to put the cover on.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Nice, Firm Dog Bed
authors_reviews.text: Purchased the 48x30x7 brown XL dog bed. The width and length were correct but the thickness measured a little over 6". I allowed it to sit 12 hrs before letting him get on it. I'm not concerned about the thickness since it is super firm. Bought it for my 95 lb golden doodle. This was his 1st time on it. Immediately laid down and zonked out. (I threw his blanket on top so it felt familiar)
authors_reviews.author: gator1fan

authors_reviews.title: Worth it
authors_reviews.text: Perfect for our 90 pound post-op fur baby and our 30 pound dog lays next to him comfortably. Quality material, made well, good value.
authors_reviews.author: Mom

authors_reviews.title: Impressed!
authors_reviews.text: This is one of those exceptional purchases I’ve made that I’m absolutely impressed with. It’s big, it looks like a shorter version of a twin mattress it’s that thick, and firm in a good way. My 110 rottie loves it and I imagine it helps with her aches and pains from the firmness of it. And it’s not an eye sore in the living room, the look is clean and sturdy.Happy Dog, Happy Owner.
authors_reviews.author: Moo Cow

authors_reviews.title: Comfy puppy bed
authors_reviews.text: My dog loves this new bed. It’s firm yet comfortable. Nice and thick so she could ant in the floor.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Dog bed
authors_reviews.text: Extremely comfortable dog bed. It's large enough for multiple fur babies. Very durable and extremely thick material and easy to clean. My beagle and brussels griffin love their new bed.
authors_reviews.author: ariel

authors_reviews.title: Great for elderly dogs with arthritis
authors_reviews.text: Very high quality bed. For arthritic senior dog. Dog always was seeking out our memory foam bed because it was more comfortable than old bed and couch. that made us sad that the dog was rarely by us except at night or during walks and being fed. The dog would pass up other dog beds but this one is plush enough that the dog doesn’t seek the memory foamPeople bed until night time. It’s dual layer with a soft top layer and a fun support layer. Very thick and warm with a soft fabric top. Great for tired bones of your loyal sugar faced friends
authors_reviews.author: yotacon529

authors_reviews.title: My 2 dogs love this
authors_reviews.text: My great dane/boxer mix and pit bull love to hang around my art studio when I've working. I wanted both of them to have somewhere comfortable to stay out of the way and off the hardwood floor. This fits perfectly in their favorite corner and they both go straight to it any chance they get. It saves the dane from joint pain don't sag under his weight. Its big enough for him and the pitbull, who never leaves his side, to share. Even when he stretches out. It hasn't gotten dirty enough to wash yet which is surprising because of how often they sleep on it, but it the cover is very easy to take off. Overall this is a great bed and I'm already looking to by a couple more for the rest of the house so they can have their favorite bed in more than one room of the house.
authors_reviews.author: megan mccuin

other_countries_reviews.title: HUGE AND COMFORTABLE
other_countries_reviews.text: A little pricey however its very comfortable and yes I tried it ....its big enuff for us both to be on it. Image as shown. I have a big shepherd and she stretches out with no paws hanging over the edge
other_countries_reviews.author: Rose

other_countries_reviews.title: Très grande qualité et très confortable
other_countries_reviews.text: J’ai acheté le coussin pour mon montagne des Pyrénées et il est parfait pour sa grosseur! Il peut se coucher de tout son long sur le côté sans problème. Il est souvent couché dessus au lieu de monter sur le sofa comme avant. Le coussin est très très épais, super confortable, la housse s’enlève et se remet très facilement pour la nettoyer.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Super thick; perfect for senior dogs!
other_countries_reviews.text: My senior dog absolutely LOVES this bed! He's turning 8 in about 5 months and is about 130lbs/135lbs. It's super thick so we can both snuggle on it without sinking and it's perfect for him on his own. Loved how everything was already put together (the waterproof liner and the washable cover) inside the vacuum packed plastic. Definitely would recommend if you're looking for something thick and sturdy. It took about 1 to 1.5 hours to fully expand out of the package, but it was so easy. I wish it was a little wider as my dog sprawls out when sleeping, but he's been snoring up a storm since we got it.
other_countries_reviews.author: LaurellynneBleu

other_countries_reviews.title: Thanks for your spiritual work appreciate it so
